title: Vavaea lamii
taxonomy: Vavaea lamii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It belongs to the genus Vavaea. This species is native to the tropical forests of New Guinea. Vavaea lamii is an evergreen tree that is often found growing in shaded areas. The specific classification of Vavaea lamii is still being studied, and more research is needed to confirm its exact taxonomic position.
